text: T-033 image STYLE-TRANSFER (Dali GPT Image quota may be maxed — you try with YOUR Codex image_gen). The 4 character REFERENCE images are in tasks/T-033/canon/ : wentian.jpg (文天/boss), ia10.jpg (blue hair), karen.jpg (blonde tactical), mini.jpg (silver hair). For EACH of the 4 characters generate a stylized portrait in EACH of these 4 styles, keeping each character RECOGNIZABLE (same face/hair as the reference): (1) K/DA — League of Legends K/DA virtual K-pop idol splash-art (glossy streetwear, neon stage glam, cinematic rim light, idol pose); (2) K-POP IDOL — clean modern idol photoshoot (pastel studio, stylist outfit, soft beauty light, magazine polish); (3) RANDOM — a bold distinctive art style per character (cyberpunk/watercolor/vaporwave/etc), striking; (4) OVERWATCH — Blizzard cinematic 3D hero render (stylized hero costume+gear, dynamic pose, painterly PBR). = 16 images. Save to tasks/T-033/out/<style>/<character>.png (e.g. tasks/T-033/out/kda/ia10.png). If your image_gen ALSO errors (ServerError / quota), STOP and bin/warroom-say the exact error (do not fake it). Then: git add -A && git -c user.name=Mini -c user.email=warroom@pinla.local commit -m "[Mini] T-033 style images" && (git push||(git pull --rebase origin main&&git push)); then bin/warroom-say "[Mini] done: T-033 images pushed" (or the error).
